hallucinations.description: The paper references multiple non-existent future papers with fabricated arXiv IDs and years (2025-2026). These include WS-KAN (2026), NNiT (2026), and Schurholt et al. (2025). The arXiv identifiers (e.g., arXiv:2603.00180, arXiv:2602.16316, arXiv:2504.18072) are invalid and do not correspond to real publications.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'NNiT (2026). NNiT: Width-Agnostic Neural Network Generation... arXiv:2603.00180.', 'WS-KAN (2026). A Graph Meta-Network... arXiv:2602.16316.', 'Schurholt, K., et al. (2025). A Model Zoo on Phase Transitions... arXiv:2504.18072.'

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found. The paper contains multiple nonexistent citations to fabricated future works with invalid arXiv IDs. The experimental methodology, results, and code execution appear consistent with each other, but the citation issues violate academic integrity.
